2603.14478.title: Geometric and Topological Deep Learning for Predicting Thermo-mechanical Performance in Cold Spray Deposition Process Modeling
2603.14478.paper_summary: This study presents a geometric deep learning framework for predicting cold spray particle impact responses using finite element simulation data. A parametric dataset was generated through automated Abaqus simulations spanning a systematic range of particle velocity, particle temperature, and friction coefficient, yielding five output targets including maximum equivalent plastic strain, average contact plastic strain, maximum temperature, maximum von Mises stress, and deformation ratio. Four novel algorithms i.e. a GraphSAGE-style inductive graph neural network, a Chebyshev spectral graph convolution network, a topological data analysis augmented multilayer perceptron, and a geometric attention network were implemented and evaluated. Each input sample was treated as a node in a k-nearest-neighbour feature-space graph, enabling the models to exploit spatial similarity between process conditions during training. Three-dimensional feature space visualisations and two-dimensional contour projections confirmed the highly non-linear and velocity-dominated nature of the input-output relationships. Quantitative evaluation demonstrated that GraphSAGE and GAT consistently achieved R-square values exceeding 0.93 across most targets, with GAT attaining peak performance of R-square equal to 0.97 for maximum plastic strain. ChebSpectral and TDA-MLP performed considerably worse, yielding negative R-square values for several targets. These findings establish spatial graph-based neighbourhood aggregation as a robust and physically interpretable surrogate modelling strategy for cold spray process optimisation.
2603.14478.paper_summary_zh: 這項研究提出了一個幾何深度學習框架，用於利用有限元素模擬數據預測冷噴霧顆粒撞擊反應。通過自動化的Abaqus模擬生成了一個參數數據集，涵蓋了顆粒速度、顆粒溫度和摩擦係數的系統範圍，產生了五個輸出目標，包括最大等效塑性應變、平均接觸塑性應變、最大溫度、最大冯·米塞斯應力和變形比。實施並評估了四種新穎的算法，即GraphSAGE風格的歸納圖神經網絡、切比雪夫光譜圖卷積網絡、增強的拓撲數據分析多層感知器和幾何注意力網絡。每個輸入樣本被視為k最近鄰特徵空間圖中的一個節點，使模型在訓練過程中能夠利用過程條件之間的空間相似性。三維特徵空間可視化和二維輪廓投影確認了輸入輸出關係的高度非線性和速度主導特性。定量評估顯示，GraphSAGE和GAT在大多數目標上始終達到超過0.93的R平方值，其中GAT的最大塑性應變達到0.97的峰值性能。ChebSpectral和TDA-MLP的表現則相對較差，對幾個目標產生了負的R平方值。這些發現確立了基於空間圖的鄰域聚合作為冷噴霧過程優化的一種穩健且具有物理可解釋性的替代建模策略。
2603.14478.author: Akshansh Mishra et.al.
